description: Port 4 CSS panel blocks to inline Tailwind: _skills.css, _talents.css, _powers-v2.css, _movement.css
portingNotes: wh40k-skills-panel: added tw-font-alt (font-family from CSS)
wh40k-skill-row: ported bg/border/hover styles inline; kept class as JS hook in base-actor-sheet.ts
wh40k-skill-icon: ported block/size/background-image styles inline
wh40k-skill-name: ported button resets + hover color inline
wh40k-skill-roll: ported button resets + hover inline
wh40k-skill-favorite: ported inline
wh40k-train-indicator: ported active/inactive states inline in skill-row.hbs
wh40k-training-display: added bg/border inline
wh40k-skill-total: added bg/shadow inline
wh40k-advanced-untrained-section: ported border-top, mt, pt inline
wh40k-section-divider: ported font/spacing/alignment inline
wh40k-skill-row--compact: ported opacity/italic/firebrick color inline
wh40k-skill-row--locked: ported opacity inline; pseudo ::after lock icon dropped (non-essential cosmetic)
wh40k-train-btn: dead code (no template usage) - deleted with CSS block
wh40k-weapons-fullwidth: dead code - deleted with CSS block
wh40k-combat-vitals-grid: dead code - deleted with CSS block
wh40k-header-btn: ported 22x22px gold button styles to all 10 usages in talent-sheet.hbs and tab-npc.hbs
wh40k-vitals-hud: ported bg-gradient/border/shadow inline in combat-station-panel.hbs
wh40k-combat-actions: JS hook class, min-width handled by grid parent - no CSS porting needed
wh40k-power-filters: ported flex/wrap/gap/bg inline in psychic-powers-panel.hbs and orders-panel.hbs
wh40k-filter-btn: ported border/rounded/hover states inline
wh40k-tab-powers: already fully inlined with [&.active]:!tw-block and tw-p-3
wh40k-panel-powers/psychic-powers/navigator-powers/rituals/orders: passed accentBg/accentBorder/accentIcon to collapsible-panel partial instead of CSS descendant selectors
wh40k-affliction-header: ported @apply tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-between tw-mb-1 inline
wh40k-affliction-list: ported flex+gap+min-height inline
wh40k-affliction-row: ported bg/border/hover inline
wh40k-affliction-name: ported flex-1/cursor/text styles inline
wh40k-affliction-del: ported button styles inline
wh40k-mobility-section/wh40k-size-section: ported bg/border/rounded inline in movement-panel-full.hbs
wh40k-size-select: ported full select styling inline
wh40k-speed-value: ported font-alt/size/weight/color inline in combat-station-panel.hbs and tab-overview.hbs
wh40k-speed-label: ported size/weight/uppercase/tracking inline
wh40k-speed-box/wh40k-speed-data: dead code (templates use wh40k-speed-inline instead) - deleted
wh40k-token-movement/__btn/__value: JS-generated, outside .wh40k-rpg scope; ported to inline DOM styles in token.ts
wh40k-no-results: JS-generated in character-sheet.ts; ported to inline DOM styles
